overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player navigates from a wide neon-lit intersection past a Japanese torii gate, along a green pedestrian path marked with red figures, and turns into a narrow graffiti-covered alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban intersection with Japanese torii gate

events.description: panning left from street corner to view the wide intersection and approaching torii gate
black sedan passes by with headlights illuminated

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection, observing the neon-lit cityscape and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving through the intersection at the start of the clip
black sedan passing by with headlights on

entered.detail: tall buildings with pink and green neon signage dominating the skyline
large industrial concrete pillar and overpass framework
traditional Japanese gate structure illuminated with red neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a neon-lit urban intersection in Night City. The camera pans left from a street corner, revealing a Japanese torii gate glowing with red neon in the distance. A white sports car passes by on the right, followed by a black sedan. The player walks forward through the wide intersection, passing under a large concrete overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: green pedestrian walkway with neon advertisements

events.description: turning right onto the bright green pedestrian path marked with red figures
continuing straight along the path as cars with red taillights pass on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the designated green pedestrian path with red figure markings, observing neon signs on the right

notable_agents.action: car with red taillights driving away on the adjacent street

entered.detail: bright green walkway with large red pedestrian symbols painted on the surface
large illuminated advertisement displaying 'BIG' in white letters
illuminated food and drink vending machines along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The player turns right onto a distinctive green pedestrian walkway marked with red human figures. Neon advertisements line the right side of the path, including a prominent 'BIG' billboard and glowing vending machines. Cars pass by on the left side of the path as the player walks toward the Columbus street intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with Columbus sign and alley entrance

events.description: approaching the Columbus street sign and intersection
turning right at the intersection into the narrow alleyway
pedestrian in white top passes close to the camera view

agents.ego_description: approaching the Columbus intersection, then turning right into a narrow alleyway

notable_agents.action: woman in white top walking across the intersection

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading 'Columbus'
narrow dark passage between concrete buildings
concrete wall covered with colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the Columbus street intersection, passing the green street sign. A pedestrian crosses in front of the camera. The scene transitions as the player turns right, leaving the main street behind and entering a narrow alleyway with graffiti-covered walls and dimmer lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with graffiti and debris

events.description: entering the narrow alleyway with graffiti-covered walls and reduced lighting
lighting becomes significantly darker as moving deeper into the enclosed alley

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley, passing trash and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: confined passage between tall buildings with limited overhead visibility
green industrial trash container against the wall
elevated metal walkway connecting buildings above the alley
metal safety barrier along the left edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the narrow alleyway, where the bright neon lights of the main street give way to dimmer, more atmospheric lighting. Graffiti covers the walls on both sides, and a green dumpster sits against the right wall. An overhead walkway spans the alley above, while trash and debris litter the concrete ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-drenched urban intersection into the dim, claustrophobic depths of a graffiti-covered alleyway. It begins at a street corner, panning left to reveal a glowing red torii gate as cars stream past and the camera moves under a massive concrete overpass. As the player turns right, the environment shifts onto a green pedestrian walkway lined with red figures and bright advertisements, including a prominent BIG billboard and glowing vending machines. The scene then transitions at the Columbus street intersection, where the camera leaves the main thoroughfare behind to turn into a narrow side street. Finally, the bright city lights fade into atmospheric shadows as the camera moves deeper into the alley, passing a green dumpster and debris beneath an overhead walkway.
